description: CompositionGreen and gold printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round slit neck with a pleated mock chest placket, gold piping around the placket, three-quarter sleeves with pleated cuffs that have a gold band, and split side seamsFitRegularWash careWash cold using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsThis elegant kurta from vishudh speaks volumes of your class and exudes femininity with its timeless design and cuts. The traditional print is sure to make this a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with leggings or skinny jeans.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 25"
